title: ConfigMaps, Secrets, Environment, Projection, Rotation, and Change Propagation · Cluster Repair Bay
summary: An incident responder inherits a plausible but defective configuration and secret propagation contract; preserve status and events, isolate the first causal fault in configmaps, secrets, environment, projection, rotation, and change propagation, and retain a regression check. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in configuration and secret propagation contract and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, chan…
objectives: Create and consume ConfigMaps through keys, files, env, envFrom, command arguments, immutable objects, and size or naming boundaries.
Distinguish base64 representation, API and etcd encryption, transport protection, RBAC, node exposure, application use, and external secret authority.
Compose Secret, ConfigMap, service account token, downward API, and cluster trust bundle projections with scoped paths, modes, audiences, and refresh behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# kubernetes-basics cumulative orchestration portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never invoke kubectl, read kubeconfig, contact a cluster API, or execute host commands.
workspace: kubernetes
version-baseline:
  kubernetes: 1.36.2
  minikube: 1.38.1
  gateway-api: 1.5.1
  helm: 4.2.2
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-cluster
evidence:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug K8s Configmap Source Consumption
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug release embeds a credential in Git, mixes immutable and rotating config, uses env projection where a file watch is required, and grants broad Secret reads. Separate creation, consumption, update propagation, encryption, RBAC, and rotation evidence. steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug K8s Secret Rotation Boundary
steps.instruction:
Append the Kubernetes evidence item headed "  # Evidence: k8s-secret-rotation-boundary-1djiuk". Tailor its config-secret-policy.yaml change to the current stakeholder case, retain a deterministic API or manifest review command, reject one concrete failure, and record a repair. The browser analyzes text only; run kubectl, Helm, kubeadm, and cluster commands later in an authorized disposable transfer environment.

Evidence target: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug K8s Secret Rotation Boundary.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns K8s Secret Rotation Boundary into observable performance evidence. For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug K8s Secret Rotation Boundary, keep K8s Secret Rotation Boundary connected to mechanically reviewable Kubernetes object, status, and transfer evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: k8s-secret-rotation-boundary-1djiuk
  - competency: k8s-secret-rotation-boundary
    artifact: config-secret-policy.yaml
    decision: secret rotation boundary
    environment: kubeadm recovery cluster restored onto replacement nodes
    fault-injection: drop one metrics series during an autoscaling surge
    retained-proof: component versions skew drain timing and recovery rehearsal
    case-key: 1djiuk
    change: |
      public-config: immutable-configmap
      runtime-secret: projected-bound-source
      token-audience: intake-api
      environment-refresh: rollout-required
      mounted-refresh: observed
      redaction: enforced
    verify: kubectl get configmap status-config -o json && kubectl auth can-i get secrets --as system:serviceaccount:intake:status-api
    failure: Reject base64-as-encryption, static environment rotation, broad secret reads, subPath refresh claims, or values leaked through rendered output.
    repair: Separate config and secret authority, scope projections and audiences, trigger observable rollouts, rotate credentials, and verify redaction.
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The K8s Secret Rotation Boundary structural check is only one gate. configuration and secret propagation contract must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.

Separate creation, consumption, update propagation, encryption, RBAC, and rotation evidence. Competency probe: Design short-lived credentials, audience, rotation, revocation, redaction, audit, reload, failure, and recovery evidence across workload and external systems.

For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug K8s Secret Rotation Boundary, challenge the documented misconception with object, condition, event, policy, failure, repair, rollback, and transfer evidence: Replacing a Secret object proves every consumer stopped using the old credential.

For Publish the incident record · Debug K8s Secret Rotation Boundary, challenge the documented misconception with object, condition, event, policy, failure, repair, rollback, and transfer evidence: Replacing a Secret object proves every consumer stopped using the old credential.
